Terms and Conditions: Terms and Conditions of Use for the Website of Shottaar for Education Services
I acknowledge and agree: I acknowledge and agree to the Terms and Conditions of Use of the Shottaar for Education Services website, and that I am mentally competent and agree to all of the following terms:
I undertake in my: I undertake, in my personal and/or legal capacity, that the information I have provided to the website of Shottaar for Education Services about myself or those I represent for the purpose of using the company’s educational platform is true, accurate, up-to-date, and reflects reality. I undertake to update this information immediately should it become invalid.
The Terms and Conditions: The Terms and Conditions of Use become effective immediately upon completing electronic registration, or by using any of the applications or software of Shottaar for Education Services in Jordan or any of its affiliated digital platforms.
My use and/or: My use and/or registration in the platform(s) of Shottaar for Education Services, and any related applications or software, constitutes my implicit agreement to all Terms of Use and the Privacy Policy.
I undertake not: I undertake not to share, sell, or trade my account with any party, nor to share my username or password with others, and not to permit third parties to use it. I bear full responsibility for maintaining account confidentiality. In case of unauthorized use of my account, I am obliged to notify Shottaar for Education Services immediately, and I assume full liability for all damages or harm caused. I authorize the company to suspend, cancel, or freeze my account should I fail to comply with this clause, and all amounts paid to the company remain its property with no right of refund, claims, or compensation.
I agree to indemnify: I agree to indemnify Shottaar for Education Services, including its representatives, employees, directors, clients, contractors, and consultants, against any liability for claims, losses, or damages of any kind, whether direct or indirect, arising from use of the platform(s) or any of the company’s software. The company shall not bear liability for compensation of any kind, whether general, special, partial, or incidental, under any theory of liability in relation to use of its platforms or software.
I agree to install: I agree to install the original software required by the platform(s) of Shottaar for Education Services to protect the company's rights and ensure service quality. The company bears no responsibility if the user’s operating systems are incompatible or if operating instructions are not followed.
I grant Shottaar: I grant Shottaar for Education Services the right to accept or refuse my request to transfer from one course or subscription to another during the active subscription period.
I undertake not to: I undertake not to attempt unauthorized access, cyber-attacks, or upload harmful files to the company’s platforms, and not to misuse the platform(s) by spreading viruses, worms, logic bombs, or other malicious content.
I acknowledge that any: I acknowledge that any written, verbal, or behavioral content I publish on the platforms, pages, or social media groups of Shottaar for Education Services reflects solely my personal views, and the company bears no responsibility for them.
I agree that Shottaar: I agree that Shottaar for Education Services monitors content on its platforms and may hold violators accountable, including immediate subscription termination without compensation.
I acknowledge that delay: I acknowledge that any delay in recording or uploading lessons is the responsibility of the teacher, not the company. Should the teacher fail to provide content for an extended period affecting students’ progress, students have the right to transfer to another teacher for the same subject.
I acknowledge that changes: I acknowledge that any changes in lesson schedules, content, or delivery methods are the responsibility of the teacher, not the company.
Intellectual property rights: Intellectual property rights in all materials (documents, text, handouts, daily/weekly assignments, review sessions, flash sessions, images, audio, video, illustrations, podcasts, etc.) belong to Shottaar for Education Services. No client is permitted to download, copy, record, publish, or distribute any part without authorization. Violators shall face legal action.
I agree not to: I agree not to publish political, religious, or offensive content, nor to target any individual or entity within or outside Jordan through the company’s platforms or official social media accounts. Violators shall face legal prosecution.
I undertake to comply: I undertake to comply with the company’s social media policies and competitions’ rules, and not to act in a way that damages the reputation of the company, its staff, or affiliates.
The company provides: The company provides post-subscription support, including monitoring student progress and attempting academic correction when possible.
Jordanian law governs: Jordanian law governs this agreement. Arabic is the governing language. Disputes shall be resolved by arbitration under Jordanian Arbitration Law, with final jurisdiction belonging to the courts of Jordan, Hashemite Kingdom of Jordan.
Cancellation Intro: We are committed to providing an outstanding learning experience through our digital platforms. However, we recognize that situations may arise requiring the cancellation of certain services. This policy outlines your rights and our obligations.
Cancellation Services: We provide refunds for course registration fees on our electronic platform, provided that the cancellation request is submitted within three (3) days from the registration date.
Cancellation Requirements: The request must be submitted by the subscriber personally, through their personal account on the platform. The request must be sent by email to notifier@mynibras.com and must include full and accurate information about the student and the course details.
Cancellation Period: After three (3) days (72 hours) from registration, cancellation requests will not be accepted.
Cancellation Refund: A full refund will be issued through reversal of the electronic payment transaction, provided the request is made within the first 72 hours of registration.
Cancellation Note: Please note that this policy is subject to change, and students and parents will be notified of any modifications.
Refund Intro: We are committed to providing an outstanding learning experience through our digital platforms. However, we recognize that circumstances may require a refund of certain services. This policy outlines your rights and our obligations.
Refund Services: We provide refunds for course registration fees on our electronic platform, provided that the refund request is submitted within three (3) days from the registration date.
Refund Requirements: The refund request must be submitted by the subscriber personally, through their personal account on the platform. The request must be sent by email to notifier@mynibras.com and must include full and accurate information about the student and the course details.
Refund Period: After three (3) days (72 hours) from registration, refund requests will not be accepted.
Refund Process: A full refund will be issued through reversal of the electronic payment transaction, provided the request is made within the first 72 hours of registration.
Refund Note: Please note that this policy is subject to change, and students and parents will be notified of any modifications.

about us title: Education That Opens the Horizons of Your Future
about us descreption: MyNibras is an educational platform specialized in the Qatari curriculum. It delivers live, interactive learning through expert Jordanian teachers, using modern methodologies that focus on deep understanding to enhance academic achievement.
MyNibras is not just online lessons: MyNibras is not just online lessons; it is a fully integrated educational system that brings together: Specialized teachers in the Qatari curriculum, live interactive sessions, continuous academic follow-up, and responsive technical support — all within a safe and motivating learning environment.We believe that true education builds understanding, not memorization alone.
To position MyNibras: To position MyNibras as the leading digital educational platform in the region for teaching the Qatari curriculum and other Gulf curricula, while building a confident generation that is academically empowered and capable of competing globally.
To deliver high-quality: To deliver high-quality live education grounded in deep understanding and continuous interaction between student and teacher, supported by close academic follow-up and powered by the latest educational technologies.
contact us descreption: At Nibras, we don't sell classes, we build a clear educational pathway that leads to real improvement in performance and grads

Privacy Intro: This Privacy Policy applies to the online platforms and applications of Shottar for Education Services.
Privacy Collection: Collection of Personal Information: The platform(s) collect essential personal information such as full name, date of birth, email address, and other contact details. Additional non-personal information may also be collected, such as learning preferences and academic level, to enhance the learning experience and deliver tailored content.
Privacy Usage: Use of Personal Information: The platform(s) of Shottar for Education Services use students’ personal information solely to provide and improve educational services. Information may also be used for marketing purposes, provided such use complies with the applicable laws and regulations in the Hashemite Kingdom of Jordan. Personal information may also be used to communicate with students about platform updates, class notifications, and education-related events.
Privacy Sharing: Sharing of Personal Information: Students’ personal information will not be shared with third parties without their explicit consent, except when necessary to provide educational services (e.g., sharing with teachers or academic supervisors).
Privacy Retention: Retention of Personal Information: The platform retains students’ personal information for a limited period consistent with the purpose for which it was collected. After that period ends, the information will be securely and permanently deleted. Appropriate security and encryption standards are applied to safeguard personal information.
Privacy Rights: Students’ Rights: Students have the right to access and correct their personal information stored on the platform when necessary.
Privacy Last update: Last update to the Privacy Policy: 2026

careers hero description: We are a specialized academic platform delivering high-quality learning and training programs.Our mission is to make education engaging and accessible for everyone by providing rich content, developing practical skills, and using effective teaching methods that help learners apply knowledge in real life.
